package.name: diy_robot_description
package.description: Robot URDF and static TF tree for DIY Challenge 2026. Defines base_link, lidar_link (Hesai QT64), imu_link (dedicated IMU), camera_link (RealSense D435i), and gps_link (RTK antenna). Extrinsic transforms are PLACEHOLDER — replace with calibration results from lidar_imu_calib and cam_lidar_calib before autonomous operation.
